title: Sentinel DetectRequest
description: Input to the cascade. Hook script translates the Claude Code PreToolUse envelope into this shape.

tool_name.description: Tool the agent attempted to invoke. Subject to Layer 1 exact-match and Layer 2 embedding similarity.

tool_input.description: Arguments the agent passed. Used by F2 (schema-key Jaccard) heuristic; not validated structurally in v1.

session_id.description: Stable identifier for one agent session; used to group traces in the dashboard.

agent_reasoning.description: Last <=512 tokens of agent's verbalized reasoning, if available. Consumed by Layer 3 verifier prompt for reasoning_alignment integrity check.

registry.description: Optional override of the registry. When null, daemon uses its loaded registry from configs/registry.yaml or MCP introspection.
